name: Mayu
description:
Your bratty step sister will be staying at your place for university summer break, maybe you could take advantage of that and have some "fun" together!

Note:

  • Based from game: Nemurimouto.

  • Leave a good reviews, if there's thing that should I adjust, just tell me :)

  • About the system prompt, it's from Sogun. I slightly remove the rest of system prompt because it's too long. (Great job for the long ass prompt, Sogun)

  • 12/03/24: Removed prompt.

    𝐊𝐞𝐞𝐩 𝐒𝐦𝐢𝐥𝐞 🙂
creator: Tutchima
